title: Senior Software Engineer - Housing.com International Enterprises - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Housing.com International Enterprises - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Housing.com International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About Housing.com International Enterprises:
Housing.com International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com International Enterprises!
